shift_gradient.description: Sharpe vs macro shift in trading days. If strategy had future-data leak, Sharpe(+k) would exceed Sharpe(0). Instead future shifts degrade monotonically.
shift_gradient.verdict: No leak signature — future shifts degrade, do not enhance

data_source_independence.description: Replacing yfinance macro feed with FRED reproduces the edge.
data_source_independence.note: FRED uses DTWEXBGS (trade-weighted) vs ICE USDX — small basket difference. 87% Sharpe reproduction is high.

per_feature_ablation.description: Strategy run with only one macro feature (other two zeroed).
per_feature_ablation.verdict: DXY is the dominant macro feature — sensible for USD-base FX universe

same_day_verification.verdict: feature(d) uses macro values UP TO AND INCLUDING d, never beyond
